character.description: armored warrior with red scarf and cape, facing right with one sword

idle.action: near-static combat idle loop: frame 4 must be a visually identical duplicate of frame 1, with the exact same planted feet, sword tip coordinate, sword length and angle, guard, hand, cape silhouette, body height, and pose; frame 2 changes only the eyes for one blink, frame 3 changes only the chest by one subtle breathing step; never resize or reposition the weapon

attack.action: readable sword attack: compact windup, forward slash, follow-through, recovery toward combat idle; body and sword only, no detached effects

hurt.action: brief impact recoil: flinch backward, stagger, regain footing, settle toward combat idle; no counterattack and no detached effects

style: match the accepted idle anchor exactly: crisp 16-bit-inspired pixel art, identical proportions, outline weight, detail density, palette, armor, scarf, cape, face, and sword
